Title: Saint Seiya: Heaven Chapter - Overture
Writer: Michiko Yokote, Akatsuki Yamatoya, Masami Kurumada
Actors: Tôru Furuya, Hirotaka Suzuoki, Kôichi Hashimoto
Plot: Hades is defeated and Seiya can't wake up from the wounds of that battle, Saori is taking care of him away from the city; meanwhile Artemis comes to earth and claims the lifes of bronze saints for killing a God.
